forbidden.name: engine-isolation
forbidden.comment: Engine must be pure domain logic. It can only import from its own src, shared, or allowed libraries.

forbidden.name: engine-purity
forbidden.comment: Engine should not import IO or env-related node modules.

forbidden.name: shared-isolation
forbidden.comment: Shared should have no workspace dependencies and only essential node modules.

forbidden.name: no-client-in-server
forbidden.comment: Server should never import from Client

forbidden.name: no-server-in-client
forbidden.comment: Client should never import from Server (only via shared)

forbidden.name: no-direct-db-in-engine
forbidden.comment: Engine should never import database logic or ORM

forbidden.name: admin-isolation
forbidden.comment: Admin UI must not import server internals directly — use shared package only.

forbidden.name: no-test-imports-in-prod
forbidden.comment: Production source files must not import test-only modules.

forbidden.name: no-scripts-in-app
forbidden.comment: Workspace package source must not import from scripts/ or bin/.
